vocab.meaning: sự thận trọng trong chi tiêu/tài chính
vocab.example: I exercise a high degree of fiscal prudence when it comes to footwear, usually opting for longevity over fleeting trends.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công cao cấp
vocab.example: I don't mind paying extra for shoes that boast premium craftsmanship, as they provide superior comfort and support.

vocab.meaning: những hạn chế về ngân sách/tài chính
vocab.example: Due to my current budgetary constraints, I've had to scale back my spending on luxury sneakers this year.

vocab.meaning: sự trung thành với thương hiệu
vocab.example: My brand loyalty to certain Italian shoemakers means I am willing to save up for months to afford their latest collections.

vocab.meaning: hiệu suất giảm dần (chi thêm tiền nhưng chất lượng không tăng tương xứng)
vocab.example: Once you go beyond a certain price point, you often hit a wall of diminishing returns in terms of actual shoe quality.

vocab.meaning: giá trị sử dụng thực tế
vocab.example: I strictly evaluate footwear based on its utilitarian value rather than its status as a fashion statement.

vocab.meaning: tỉ lệ giữa giá cả và chất lượng
vocab.example: I always look for a favorable price-to-quality ratio, which usually leads me to reputable local cobblers.

vocab.meaning: sự nuông chiều bản thân quá mức/xa xỉ
vocab.example: Spending over a thousand dollars on a single pair of boots would be an extravagant indulgence that I simply cannot justify.

vocab.meaning: tích lũy dần theo thời gian
vocab.example: While I don't buy shoes often, the total amount I spend tends to accumulate over time because I prefer high-performance sports gear.

vocab.meaning: ngoài tầm với (về mặt tài chính)
vocab.example: Most bespoke footwear is currently out of reach for me, so I stick to off-the-rack options from department stores.
